description: An Italian monthly payslip (busta paga / cedolino) showing employee/employer header fields, a VOCE/DESCRIZIONE table of pay and deduction lines, and the gross/net totals.

employeeName.description: The employee name as printed in the COGNOME E NOME field, without the employee code.

employerName.description: The employer / company name as printed in the DITTA header field.

codiceFiscale.description: The employee tax code (CODICE FISCALE) exactly as printed.

payPeriod.description: The pay period (MESE DI RETRIBUZIONE) exactly as printed, e.g. month and year.

payLines.description: One object per printed row of the VOCE/DESCRIZIONE table; each row has a code and an Italian description, and may carry an earning (COMPETENZE) and/or a deduction (TRATTENUTE) amount.

voce.description: The VOCE code printed at the start of the row, kept exactly as printed.

description.description: The DESCRIZIONE label of the row exactly as printed in Italian; this is the matching key for the row.

unitaDiMisura.description: The unit of measure (Unita' di misura) for the row exactly as printed, or null when blank.

quantita.description: The Quantita' column value for the row as a number, or null when blank.

base.description: The Base column value for the row as a number, or null when blank.

trattenute.description: The deduction amount in the TRATTENUTE column for the row as a number, or null when there is no deduction on this row.

competenze.description: The earning amount in the COMPETENZE column for the row as a number, or null when there is no earning on this row.

totaleCompetenze.description: The total earnings (TOTALE COMPETENZE) as a number without separators.

totaleTrattenute.description: The total deductions (TOTALE TRATTENUTE) as a number without separators.

nettoInBusta.description: The net pay (NETTO IN BUSTA) as a number without separators.
